tasks.title: Confirm OQ-3 numeric quota values with owner
tasks.description:
OQ-3 was deferred to implementation. The §5 placeholder values (tourist-free: 10, tourist-plus: 50, tourist-vip: 200, owner/complex: inherit tourist-vip = 200) must be confirmed or replaced before they are hardcoded in plans.config.ts and the extras migration.

Action: present the §5 table to the owner and capture confirmed per-tier values for both MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH and MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH. Record the decision in engram under topic_key: spec/SPEC-283/quota-values.

Acceptance criteria:
- Confirmed numeric values for all plan tiers (tourist-free, tourist-plus, tourist-vip, owner/complex) for both new limits are documented and saved to engram.
- No real -1 for any AI quota (cost-guardrail constraint from SPEC-211 §6.1 stays in force).

subtasks.title: Present §5 placeholder table to owner
Record confirmed values in engram (topic_key: spec/SPEC-283/quota-values)

tasks.title: Add MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH LimitKey to billing types, LIMIT_METADATA, and RESOURCE_NAMES
tasks.description:
The consumer-side chat quota requires a brand-new LimitKey that does not yet exist. Three files are exhaustive Record<LimitKey, …> maps — a missing entry is a TypeScript compile error — so all three must be updated atomically.

Files to change:
1. packages/billing/src/types/plan.types.ts — add enum value `MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH = 'max_ai_chat_consumer_per_month'` immediately after `MAX_AI_CHAT_PER_MONTH`, with JSDoc explaining it is the consumer-side (tourist/requesting-user) monthly quota distinct from the owner-side limit.
2. packages/billing/src/config/limits.config.ts — add `[LimitKey.MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH]: { name: 'AI chat interactions per month (consumer)', description: 'Monthly AI chat quota for the requesting (consuming) user. Distinct from MAX_AI_CHAT_PER_MONTH which meters the listing owner (SPEC-283).' }` to LIMIT_METADATA.
3. apps/api/src/utils/limit-check.ts — add `max_ai_chat_consumer_per_month: 'conversaciones con IA por mes (consumidor)'` to RESOURCE_NAMES.

NOTE: packages/billing/src/config/model-c-field-split.ts does NOT need updating. MODEL_C_FIELD_SPLIT classifies limits as logical facets (limitsKeysPresent / limitsValues), not individual keys — new keys are covered automatically by the existing `limitsKeysPresent: 'capability'` entry.

NOTE: MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH already exists in all three maps (it was removed only from plan config values in SPEC-211, not from the enum/metadata).

Acceptance criteria:
- `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors from the workspace root.
- No other compilation failures introduced.

subtasks.title: Add MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH enum value to plan.types.ts
Add LIMIT_METADATA entry in limits.config.ts
Add RESOURCE_NAMES entry in limit-check.ts
Run pnpm typecheck — must pass

tasks.title: Add ai_search per-plan limits and consumer chat quota values to plans.config.ts
tasks.description:
Restores MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH (removed in SPEC-211 T-004) and adds MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH to all 9 accommodation plans in packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts. Use values confirmed in T-001 (§5 placeholders: free=10, plus=50, vip=200, owner/complex inherit vip=200).

Changes:
1. TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS constant (~line 74): add `limit(LimitKey.MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH, 200)` and `limit(LimitKey.MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH, 200)`. These propagate automatically to all owner/complex plans via mergeLimits inheritance (SPEC-216 OQ-4).
2. TOURIST_FREE_PLAN limits array: add `limit(LimitKey.MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH, 10)` and `limit(LimitKey.MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH, 10)`.
3. TOURIST_PLUS_PLAN limits array: add `limit(LimitKey.MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH, 50)` and `limit(LimitKey.MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH, 50)`.
4. TOURIST_VIP_PLAN limits: already spreads `[...TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS]` so it picks up both keys at 200 automatically.
5. Owner/complex plans: inherit both keys at 200 from TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS via mergeLimits — no individual changes needed unless overriding.
6. Remove all 'MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH removed from all plans (SPEC-211 T-004)' comments from every plan definition.

Cost guardrail: confirm no plan ends up with value -1 for the new keys.

Acceptance criteria:
- `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- All 9 plans in ALL_PLANS have both MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH and MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH in their limits arrays.
- No plan has value -1 for either new key.
- Owner/complex plans carry value 200 for both keys.

Add both new limit keys to TOURIST_PLUS_PLAN limits

Remove all SPEC-211 T-004 removal comments

tasks.title: Add consumer-limit-reached i18n keys for ai_chat (es/en/pt)
tasks.description:
The chat route needs a distinct error message for the consumer-side quota-exhausted case, separate from the existing owner-side 'accommodations.aiChat.unavailable' (SPEC-211 copy). Add new keys to the aiChat namespace in all three locale files.

Files to change:
1. packages/i18n/src/locales/es/accommodations.json — inside the 'aiChat' object, add:
   - 'consumerLimitReached': 'Alcanzaste tu límite mensual de chats con IA. Actualizá tu plan para obtener más acceso.'
   - 'consumerLimitUpgradeCta': 'Ver planes'
2. packages/i18n/src/locales/en/accommodations.json — inside 'aiChat', add:

   - 'consumerLimitUpgradeCta': 'View plans'
3. packages/i18n/src/locales/pt/accommodations.json — inside 'aiChat', add:
   - 'consumerLimitReached': 'Você atingiu seu limite mensal de chats com IA. Atualize seu plano para obter mais acesso.'
   - 'consumerLimitUpgradeCta': 'Ver planos'

After editing locale files, run `pnpm --filter @repo/i18n generate-types` to regenerate TypeScript type declarations.

Note: no search-specific i18n changes needed — the middleware uses a hardcoded Spanish string and the frontend already has aiSearch.quotaExhausted.

- `pnpm --filter @repo/i18n generate-types` succeeds with no errors.

tasks.title: Write idempotent Model C extras migration 023 for new AI limit keys
tasks.description:
Create packages/db/src/migrations/extras/023-billing-plans-ai-consumer-search-limits.plan.sql. The latest existing migration is 022-feature-flags-tables.table.sql.

This migration adds MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH and MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH to the `limits` JSONB column of every accommodation plan row in `billing_plans`. Must be idempotent (safe to re-apply) and OR-PRESERVE (never overwrite operator-set values).

Implementation pattern (follow 014-spec211-ai-monetization.data.sql as model):
- Use `UPDATE billing_plans SET limits = limits || jsonb_build_object('max_ai_search_per_month', <value>) WHERE slug = '<slug>' AND NOT (limits ? 'max_ai_search_per_month')` per plan slug × key.
- Repeat for max_ai_chat_consumer_per_month.
- Wrap in a single transaction.
- Values: tourist-free=10, tourist-plus=50, tourist-vip=200, all owner-*/complex-*=200.
- Exclude commerce-listing and partner-listing slugs.

Acceptance criteria:
- Migration applies cleanly on a fresh DB.
- Re-application returns without error.
- All accommodation plan slugs have both keys in their limits JSONB.
- Pre-existing custom values are NOT overwritten.

subtasks.title: Create 023-billing-plans-ai-consumer-search-limits.plan.sql with header comment
Write idempotent UPDATE statements for max_ai_search_per_month (9 plan slugs)
Write idempotent UPDATE statements for max_ai_chat_consumer_per_month (9 plan slugs)
Wrap in transaction with rollback on error
Verify migration applies cleanly on a dev DB snapshot

tasks.title: Extend createAiQuotaMiddleware to support skipEntitlementGate option for auth-baseline features
tasks.description:
apps/api/src/middlewares/ai-quota.ts — `createAiQuotaMiddleware` always enforces step 3 (entitlement gate). For ai_search this is wrong: no plan has the AI_SEARCH entitlement (auth-baseline per OQ-1). Re-adding the quota middleware for search without skipping the gate would block every request with 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED.

Changes:
1. Add exported type: `export type AiQuotaMiddlewareOptions = { readonly skipEntitlementGate?: boolean; };`
2. Change factory signature: `export function createAiQuotaMiddleware(feature: QuotaGatedAiFeature, options?: AiQuotaMiddlewareOptions): MiddlewareHandler<AppBindings>`
3. Guard step 3 with: `if (!options?.skipEntitlementGate) { /* existing entitlement check */ }`
4. Update JSDoc to document the new option with auth-baseline rationale and usage example.

Existing callers pass no second argument — their behavior is unchanged.

Acceptance criteria:
- `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- Existing apps/api/test/middlewares/ai-quota.test.ts tests pass without modification.
- When skipEntitlementGate=true, middleware enforces steps 1/2/4/5 only (no entitlement check).

subtasks.title: Add AiQuotaMiddlewareOptions type export
Add optional options param to createAiQuotaMiddleware signature
Guard step 3 entitlement check with skipEntitlementGate flag
Update JSDoc with new param documentation and usage example
Run existing ai-quota.test.ts — must pass unchanged

tasks.title: Re-add search quota middleware to search-chat.ts
tasks.description:
apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-chat.ts — Re-introduces createAiQuotaMiddleware('search', { skipEntitlementGate: true }) to the middleware stack, reverting SPEC-211 G-4 / §7.7.

Changes:
1. Import createAiQuotaMiddleware from '../../../middlewares/ai-quota.js'.
2. In the middlewares array, insert `createAiQuotaMiddleware('search', { skipEntitlementGate: true })` AFTER `...createAiRateLimitMiddlewares('search')`. Effective order: entitlement → rateLimit-perUser → rateLimit-perIP → quotaCheck.
3. Replace the 'NOTE: createAiQuotaMiddleware is intentionally absent (SPEC-211 §7.7)' comment block with SPEC-283 rationale.
4. Update the route description string and module JSDoc banner to reflect graduated per-plan quota.

Acceptance criteria:
- `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- Existing search-chat integration tests still pass (adjust mocks if needed, do not delete scenarios).

subtasks.title: Import createAiQuotaMiddleware in search-chat.ts
Add quota middleware to middlewares array after rate-limit
Replace SPEC-211 §7.7 'intentionally absent' comment with SPEC-283 rationale

Run existing search-chat integration tests — must pass

tasks.title: Add consumer-side quota gate and meter to chat.ts
tasks.description:
apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/chat.ts — Add consumer-side quota enforcement after the owner quota check (step 4) and before the streaming section. Uses actor.id (the requesting tourist) and LimitKey.MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH.

Changes to insert between owner quota block and the 'Gate + quota passed' comment:
1. `const consumerLimit = getRemainingLimit(c, LimitKey.MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH);`
2. If consumerLimit === 0: throw ServiceError(LIMIT_REACHED, 'accommodations.aiChat.consumerLimitReached', { ... }).
3. If consumerLimit !== -1: getMonthlyCallCount({ userId: actor.id, feature: FEATURE, now }), then if count >= limit: throw ServiceError(LIMIT_REACHED, 'accommodations.aiChat.consumerLimitReached', { ..., upgradeUrl: '/billing/plans' }).
4. Add apiLogger.warn for both consumer-block paths.

In augmentedMeta.then, after owner recordAiUsage, add consumer metering: recordAiUsage({ userId: actor.id, ... }) in its own try/catch.

Critical: two 403 paths MUST use DIFFERENT i18n keys:
- Owner-side: 'accommodations.aiChat.unavailable' (SPEC-211, unchanged)
- Consumer-side: 'accommodations.aiChat.consumerLimitReached' (new SPEC-283 key from T-004)

Add TODO comment about self-hosting edge case (actor.id === ownerId → shared ai_usage bucket).

Acceptance criteria:
- `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- Two 403 paths produce verifiably distinct message keys.
- Consumer usage recorded after successful stream drain.

Add consumer monthly count gate (getMonthlyCallCount keyed on actor.id)
Add apiLogger.warn for both consumer-block paths
Add consumer recordAiUsage in augmentedMeta.then after owner metering

Verify two 403 paths use distinct i18n keys

tasks.title: Update SPEC-282 comparison table to show graduated per-tier AI numbers

External dependency: SPEC-282 must be merged to staging before this task can start.

Implementation steps:
1. Locate the plan comparison table component(s) in apps/web/ — likely under apps/web/src/features/billing/ or apps/web/src/components/plans/. Search for SPEC-282 references.
2. Find AI feature rows (ai_search, ai_chat consumer) in the table data structure.
3. Replace binary 'available/unavailable' cells with per-plan quota values using confirmed T-001 values. Use i18n keys from @repo/i18n for the '/mes' unit label.
4. Ensure display is consistent: tourist-free=10, plus=50, vip=200, owner/complex=200.

Note: exact component paths need grounding at implementation time.

Acceptance criteria:
- Comparison table shows graduated numbers for both AI feature rows.
- Binary display removed.
- SPEC-282 baseline tests still pass.

tasks.title: Write search-chat route quota gate tests
tasks.description:
Extend apps/api/test/integration/ai/search-chat.test.ts with tests for the re-added quota middleware. AAA pattern. No real AI engine calls.

Test cases:
1. Under-quota pass: userLimits MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH=50, getMonthlyCallCount returns 0 → 200.
2. Quota reached: same limit, count=50 → 403 LIMIT_REACHED, details.limitKey === 'max_ai_search_per_month'.
3. Limit=0 (disabled): MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH=0 → 403 immediately, getMonthlyCallCount NOT called.
4. skipEntitlementGate verified: empty userEntitlements (no AI_SEARCH) + limit=50 + count=0 → 200 (no entitlement 403).
5. billingLoadFailed=true → 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.

Acceptance criteria:
- All 5 test cases pass.
- No .only() or hard-coded .skip() directives.

subtasks.title: Write under-quota pass test
Write quota-reached 403 test
Write limit=0 immediate-block test
Write skipEntitlementGate verification test
Write billingLoadFailed 503 test

tasks.title: Write chat route consumer-side gate tests
tasks.description:
Extend apps/api/test/integration/ai/chat-route.test.ts with two-sided gate behavior tests. AAA pattern.

Test cases:
1. Owner-block path: owner lacks AI_CHAT → 403, message === 'accommodations.aiChat.unavailable'. Assert NOT consumerLimitReached.
2. Consumer-block path: owner has AI_CHAT + quota OK, consumer MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH=200, consumer count=200 → 403, message === 'accommodations.aiChat.consumerLimitReached', details.upgradeUrl present.
3. Both pass: owner 5/100, consumer 10/200 → stream proceeds (200).
4. Consumer-block while owner has quota: owner 5/100, consumer 200/200 → consumer-block copy NOT owner-block copy.
5. Consumer limit=0: MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH=0 → 403 consumer-block immediately.
6. Consumer usage recorded: recordAiUsage called with userId=actor.id after stream completes.

Acceptance criteria:
- All 6 cases pass.
- Owner-block and consumer-block messages asserted as distinct strings.
- No .only() or hard-coded .skip() directives.

tasks.title: Write extras migration 023 idempotency test
tasks.description:
Write a test verifying migration 023-billing-plans-ai-consumer-search-limits.plan.sql is idempotent and OR-PRESERVE. Follow the structure of packages/db/test/integration/spec-211-ai-monetization-migration.test.ts.

Test file: packages/db/test/integration/023-ai-consumer-search-limits.migration.test.ts

Scenarios:
1. AC-first: after running the migration, all 9 accommodation plan slugs have both keys in limits JSONB with seeded values (free=10, plus=50, vip=200, owner/complex=200).
2. AC-idem: second apply leaves rows byte-identical, no error.
3. AC-preserve: pre-existing custom value (e.g. max_ai_search_per_month=999) is NOT overwritten.
4. AC-commerce: commerce-listing and partner-listing rows unaffected.

Use withCleanSlate helper — withTestTransaction is insufficient (DO blocks use intermediate UPDATEs across statement boundaries).

Acceptance criteria:
- All 4 scenarios pass.
- No .only() directives.

tasks.title: Execute billing staging smoke for AI gate changes
tasks.description:
After T-007, T-008, T-005, T-011, T-012, and T-013 are merged to staging and deployed, execute the relevant sections of the billing staging smoke checklist per SPEC-143 policy (mandatory for any PR touching the AI gate surface).

Checklist: .qtm/specs/SPEC-143-billing-testing-coverage/docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md

Sections to execute:
1. AI search quota enforcement: exhaust tourist-free 10-call monthly cap, verify 11th call returns 403 LIMIT_REACHED with search-quota copy.
2. AI chat consumer-block path: trigger MAX_AI_CHAT_CONSUMER_PER_MONTH exhaustion on a tourist user, chat on a listing whose owner HAS quota, verify 403 with 'accommodations.aiChat.consumerLimitReached' copy and upgrade CTA.
3. AI chat owner-block regression: confirm listing with no AI_CHAT entitlement still produces 'accommodations.aiChat.unavailable' copy.
4. Migration verification: confirm billing_plans.limits JSONB in staging DB has both new keys via drizzle studio or hops log.

Sign-off: file result (date, executor, PR number, result, notes) in checklist AI section. Reference sign-off in PR description.

Acceptance criteria:
- All 4 smoke scenarios PASS.
- Sign-off filed in checklist.
- PR description references the sign-off entry.
